svg.text: Artificial intelligence (AI) is the field of computer science that creates systems capable of

text.style: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; fill: #1F2937;

svg.text: performing tasks that normally require human intelligence, such as learning, reasoning, perception, and

text.style: font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; font-size: 15px; fill: #1F2937;

svg.text: decision-making. These systems use techniques like machine learning, neural networks, and symbolic
